name: Aashirman DS Joshi
profileSummary: Aashirman DS Joshi is a Nepalese film actor. He made his feature film debut with Gangster Blues in 2017, directed by Hem Raj BC. His performance as a debutant was well received by audiences and critics alike. For his role, he won the National Film Award and the Lux Kamana Film Award for Best Debut Actor.
